---
title: '4,222 Introduction to Programming'
subtitle: 'Lecture 10: Queries'
author: "Dr. Aurélien Sallin"
date: "2026-05-08"
code-line-numbers: false
format:
  revealjs:
    template-partials:
      - ../../assets/style/title-slide.html
    width: 1280
    height: 720
    smaller: true
    embed-resources: true
    self-contained: true
    slide-number: c
    theme: ../../assets/style/hsgtheme.scss
highlight-style: dracula
cache: false
echo: false
execute:
  echo: true
---
